When performing a code review, prioritize correctness, safety, architectural boundaries, and missing tests over style.

When performing a code review, only leave actionable comments tied to specific changed lines or symbols. Prefix optional suggestions with `nit:`.

When performing a code review, do not comment on formatting or style already enforced by Biome or Prettier.

When performing a code review, apply the review priorities and workflow in the `docs/guidelines/code-review-guideline.md` file.
